## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement

## Testing

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] I have run `bats tests/` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have added new tests for my changes
- [ ] I have tested on macOS
- [ ] I have tested on Linux

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (only where absolutely necessary)
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the pull request here.
